# data/

Shared input data for the NovaWireless-GoodhartLab pipeline.

All files in this directory are either generated by the pipeline sub-projects or are source prior files used to seed synthetic data generation. No real customer, employee, or transaction data is present anywhere in this directory.

---

## Generated Files (created by running the pipeline)

| File | Generated By | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `customers.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | 2,000 synthetic customer profiles |
| `master_account_ledger.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | Account and line records for all customers |
| `master_account_ledger__anomalies.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | IMEI anomaly records injected for fraud detection modeling |
| `novawireless_employee_database.csv` | novawireless-rep-gen | 250 call center rep personas |
| `novawireless_store_rep_database.csv` | novawireless-store-gen | ~120 store rep personas across 12 locations |
| `devices.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | Synthetic device inventory |
| `eip_agreements.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | Equipment installment plan records |
| `lines.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | Line records per account |
| `line_device_usage.csv` | novawireless-customer-gen | Line-to-device usage mapping |

---

## Source Prior Files

### `employee_generation_inputs/`
CSV prior files used to seed rep persona generation. See `employee_generation_inputs/README.md` for details.

### `external/`
External reference files including a duplicate of the master account ledger used for cross-validation during anomaly injection.

### Other source files
| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `call_type_priors__from_fcc.csv` | Call type distribution priors derived from FCC consumer complaint data |
| `fcc_issue_to_call_type_map.csv` | Mapping from FCC issue categories to pipeline call types |

---

## Notes

- The `master_account_ledger.csv` file is large (~75MB) because it contains full line and agreement records for all 2,000 customers across 12 simulated months.
- Do not edit generated files manually — re-run the pipeline to regenerate them.
- All files are synthetic. See `LICENSE.md` at the repo root for the full synthetic data notice.
